# LandyMaker

LandyMaker is an AI-powered Landing Page Builder and E-commerce platform targeting the MENA region (Arabic first). It enables SaaS founders, startups, agencies, freelancers, marketers, and small businesses to create, publish, host, and manage high-converting landing pages and fully functional stores without coding.

## Core Value Proposition
- AI-Driven Generation: Instantly generate semantic, responsive landing pages.
- E-commerce Ready: Built-in shopping carts and store management.
- RTL Native: Designed ground-up for Arabic right-to-left UI perfection.
- High Performance: Hosted on Edge architecture for fast global delivery.
- Custom Domains: Connect your own domain easily.

## Key Features
- Drag-and-drop block builder
- Free templates for portfolios, SaaS, real estate, and more.
- Built-in Leads & Analytics dashboard.
- Zero-code environment.

## Use Cases
- Launching SaaS products quickly
- Validating startup ideas
- E-commerce stores with localized payment support
- Personal portfolios and CVs

## Official Links
- Website: https://www.landymaker.com
- Builder: https://www.landymaker.com/builder
